offer: A verified Codex plugin build service.
evidence_scope: Approved source ledger and recent public signals.

signals.source: Named source URL or internal evidence file
signals.signal: Teams struggle to know whether installed skills are visible in fresh tasks.
signals.why_it_matters: The pain is tied to verification and maintenance, not only installation.

icp_hypothesis: AI workflow builders with growing Codex skill libraries who need install and discovery proof.
disqualifiers: Teams seeking only one-off prompt writing.
Users without a file-based Codex environment.
verification_gaps: Confirm willingness to pay for ongoing capability maintenance.
